title: Section 96
content: The reasonable expenses incurred by any person in attending to give evidence may be allowed by 1[the High Court] to such person and shall, unless 1[the High Court] otherwise directs, be deemed to be part of the costs.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 47 of 1966, s. 42, for "the Tribunal" (w.e.f. 14-12-1966).
